checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
CAPTCHA detected: recaptcha, captcha
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
Login form at /login — no password field (possibly SSO/OAuth only)

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml found with ~15 URLs
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 1 JSON-LD blocks: unknown
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 438 divs with only 5 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 73/142 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 1/1 inputs have names
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Heading hierarchy has 6 level skip(s) (e.g., h1 → h3)
7 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 126/133 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Returns 405 but missing Allow header

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~87,053 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 3% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 21 — moderately nested
Reading this page costs $0.11–$1.31 per load ($0.54–$6.53 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, search
All 20 images have alt attributes (16 descriptive, 4 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
4 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 66ms
Moderate payload: 340KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Resource heavy: 50 scripts (heavy JS)
Compression enabled: gzip
